positive: Minimalist stylized mountain range silhouette against a gradient twilight sky, featuring stylized, geometric foreground elements like abstract planets and celestial bodies. The design should have strong negative space, high contrast black ink over a gradient background of deep indigo, lavender, and burnt orange. Clean lines, perfect symmetry, suitable for repeat apparel print or sticker design. Vector illustration aesthetic, flat design, cosmic atmosphere, centered composition, golden ratio framing, ultra detailed, high resolution.
negative: blur, low quality, watermark, signature, text, logo, extra limbs, bad anatomy, artifacts, noise, smudge, messy lines, writing, disfigured, muted colors, gradients (on subject), photorealism
